name: Auto Buy keeps summoning books automatically while gold lasts
description: AUTO BUY summons books automatically whenever gold covers the summon cost. Summoned books auto-equip into empty equip slots.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Verify the six equip slots all show empty plus placeholders (fresh save)
Click the AUTO BUY toggle button once, then wait about 10 seconds without clicking anything else
Verify at least one equip slot now shows a book with a Lv1 badge, without any manual SUMMON click (auto-buy purchased it; combat income funds purchases over time)
